_comment: Pancreatic tumor ABM — Table 1 parameters from Akman Yildiz et al. (2021) scaled to ABM (S=1e4).
_reference: Akman Yildiz T, Kose E, Elliott SL. J Biol Syst. 2021;29(4):799-832. Eqs. 2.1-2.6.
_scaling: S=1e4. Rate constants (day^-1): unchanged. Bilinear coupling (cell day)^-1: x S. Source terms (cells/day): / S. Half-saturation K (cells): / S. Carrying cap: K_ABM = 1/(a*S).
_spatial_init: Sphere init disabled: dc assumes uniform distribution; sphere packing creates 8x higher local density than dc predicts, suppressing tumor growth. Re-enable with proper spatial calibration.
_caps: Carrying capacities for C,P (logistic crowding). K_E,N,H,R kept as safety caps.
_effector_E: Eq 2.3: dE/dt = a_e - b_e*E - c_e*E*C + p_e*H*E/(g_e+H) - delta_e*R*E
_nk_N: Eq 2.4: dN/dt = a_n - b_n*N - c_n*N*C + p_n*H*N/(g_n+H) - delta_n*R*N
_helper_H: Eq 2.5: dH/dt = a_h - b_h*H + p_h*H^2/(g_h+H) - delta_h*R*H
_treg_R: Eq 2.6: dR/dt = a - delta_r*R + a_r*E + b_r*H + p_r*H*R/(g_r+H) - r*N*R
